text:
Michael Ball fans were astonished to learn he has a family connection to this year'sParis Olympics. TheWest Endstar announced on hisBBC Radio 2show last Sunday that he was heading to Paris to support his granddaughter in the Olympics.

The station later confirmed this posting a picture of him with Women's Rugby 7's star Grace Compton. "Go Grace! Michael Ball’s granddaughter Grace is competing for Team GB in the Women’s Rugby 7s at #Paris2024. We’re wishing you and all your team the best of luck Grace!" they wrote.

For many fans though this was the first they had head of Michael having a grandchild and they expressed their confusion in the comments. @pellydooda exclaimed: "What!!!! Michael Ball has a granddaughter???? Surely he’s not old enough! But good luck anyway."

READ MORE:BBC Breakfast's Carol Kirkwood leaves viewers divided with surprise announcement



However @tigerblade1967 cleared up the confusion informing his fans: "Yes, Grace is Granddaughter of Cathy McGowan and her ex husband the late Hywel Bennett, but Michael has been there all Grace's life.

Michael and his partner, former Ready Steady Go! presenter Cathy McGowan, have been together since the late 80s.

They first met when she was an entertainment reporter and interviewed him during rehearsals for Aspects of Love. The couple have lived together since 1992.

Prior to meeting Michael, Cathy was married to actor Hywel Bennett and the couple share a daughter Emma, who is Michael's stepdaughter and Grace's mother. Emma also has a son Connor whom Michael is Godfather to as well as step-grandfather.

Michael had gushed about seeing Grace play in the Olympics on his most recent Sunday morning radio programme.

"After this show I'm hotfooting it to the airport to fly over to Paris to see Grace Crompton, my granddaughter playing with the girls in Team GB's Women's Rugby 7's in Paris," he told listeners. "I can't wait to see you darling. We're bursting with pride," he gushed.

Grace, 22, plays for Bristol Bears Women and was selcted for the 2022 Commonwealth Games team

She was also named in the England squad for the 2022 Rugby World Cup Sevens Women's tournament before being selected for Paris.

Team GB are through to the quarter finals of the Olympics and are facing the USA today. Much to Michael's delight Gracie scored a try in the game and Michael took to X to proudly update followers. He posted a series of images and wrote: " Gracie’s first try scored at the Olympics," followed by a heart emoji.

title: Michael Ball fans have same query as he reveals Olympian in family | Celebrity News | Showbiz & TV | Express.co.uk
author: Fran Winston
description: West End star and BBC Radio 2 presenter Michael Ball is currently attending the Paris Olympics.
